extract: Overqwil (Japanese: ハリーマン Haryman) is a dual-type Dark/Poison Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It evolves from Hisuian Qwilfish when leveled up while knowing Barb Barrage. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
